name: Obby: Fish training
description: - Control the fish and unlock more and more powerful underwater creatures! - Collect energy currents to unlock new fish and explore the depths. - Unique “water footprints” with visual effects - leave your style in the ocean! - Rebirth system - unlock new underwater eras and become stronger. - Tournaments and leaderboards - become the fastest swimmer in the underwater world!
